title: Review
description: A structured representation of a review, including key themes, summary, sentiment, pros and cons, and the reviewer's name.

key_themes.description: The main themes or topics discussed in the review

summary.description: A concise summary of the review

sentiment.description: The sentiment of the review, either 'positive', 'neutral' or 'negative'

pros.description: A list of positive aspects mentioned in the review, if any

cons.description: A list of negative aspects mentioned in the review, if any
